subcategory: SVG loading spinner with multiple shapes
use_cases: Indicating loading states during async operations
Displaying wait states during page transitions
Providing visual feedback during file uploads
ai_summary: A minimal SVG-based loader component featuring three distinct loading animation variants: a circle, triangle, and square. Built with plain SVG shapes and CSS, this atomic component serves as a lightweight feedback indicator for loading states in web applications. The flat, minimalist design ensures broad compatibility and fast rendering across any platform.
